title: Agentic Ops Agent YAML Schema
description: Platform-level config for Agentic Ops workflows. Claude Code files (.mcp.json, settings.json, agents/*.md, skills/, hooks/hooks.json) are authored directly — not generated from this file.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this workflow does

version.description: Semantic version of the workflow config

session.description: Session-level settings passed to Claude Code SDK at invocation time

max_turns.description: Maximum conversation turns before forced stop

model.description: Model override (defaults to LM Studio configured model)

env.description: Non-secret environment variables injected into the runtime container for ${VAR} expansion in .mcp.json headers.

secrets.description: Encrypted credentials (Pulumi-style). Keys become container env vars available for ${VAR} expansion in .mcp.json headers.

runtime.description: Platform-level runtime config (not passed to Claude Code)

parallel_workers.description: Max concurrent agent sessions for this workflow

lost_task_timeout_sec.description: Heartbeat-loss timeout. If no heartbeat arrives within this window, the session is marked lost.

runtime_timeout_sec.description: Wall-clock runtime ceiling for a session attempt. Prevents long-running misdirected sessions from burning tokens indefinitely.

ask_user_question_reminder.description: Late-session reminder policy for prompting the agent to use AskUserQuestion when it may be stuck.

enabled.description: Enable a one-shot non-blocking reminder during long or nearly exhausted sessions.

min_turns.description: Do not send the reminder before this many observed turns.

turn_budget_ratio.description: Trigger once the session crosses this fraction of max_turns.

time_budget_ratio.description: Trigger once the session crosses this fraction of runtime_timeout_sec.

recent_question_turn_window.description: Suppress the reminder if AskUserQuestion was already used within this many recent turns.

alert_coalesce_window_sec.description: Window to coalesce duplicate alerts (0 = disabled)

memory_volumes.description: Named Docker volumes for persistent agent memory

prompt.description: Task prompt to inject when the schedule fires

message_channel.description: Optional message channel for the scheduled task's final completion post

messaging.description: Messaging integration config (platform-level routing, not Claude Code)

trigger_pattern.description: Message pattern that triggers this workflow (e.g., '@agent')
